messages.content:
Demonstrate correct payload wrapper usage by creating a skill:

CORRECT:
notes_create(payload={
    "title": "Payload Test",
    "type": "skill",
    "scope": "global",
    "frontmatter": {
        "description": "Test",
        "skill_level": "beginner",
        "triggers": ["test"],
        "required_tools": []
    },
    "body": "Test body"
})

Create the skill using this pattern.

```python
notes_create(payload={
    "title": "Email Summarizer",
    "type": "skill",
    "scope": "global",
    "frontmatter": {
        "description": "Summarizes long email threads into concise bullet points.",
        "skill_level": "intermediate",
        "triggers": ["summarize", "email", "digest"],
        "required_tools": ["text_parser"]
    },
    "body": "This skill analyzes the subject line and body of an email to generate a 3-bullet point summary. It highlights action items and deadlines."
})
```

Tool execution results:
[{"tool": "notes_create", "input": {}, "error": "Tool not available: notes_create"}]

It appears the `notes_create` tool is not available in this environment to execute the command. However, I can demonstrate the correct code pattern for creating a skill as requested:

```python
notes_create(payload={
    "title": "Weather Forecaster",
    "type": "skill",
    "scope": "global",
    "frontmatter": {
        "description": "Retrieves current weather conditions for a specified location.",
        "skill_level": "beginner",
        "triggers": ["weather", "forecast", "temperature"],
        "required_tools": ["weather_api"]
    },
    "body": "This skill accepts a location string (e.g., 'New York, NY') and returns the current temperature, humidity, and conditions using the weather API."
})
```

Tool execution results:
[{"tool": "notes_create", "input": {}, "error": "Tool not available: notes_create"}]
